query:
INSERT INTO licenses (userId, planType, status, expiresAt, featureClients, featureDocuments, featureAgenda, featureSms, featureMultiUsers, featureExport, maxClients, maxUsers, notes, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  1650001,
  'studio',
  'active',
  DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR),
  1, 1, 1, 0, 0, 1,
  500, 3,
  'Licence test créée depuis la console admin - Studio FRANCOIS',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
